markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 27, 2026 2 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 85.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Zach McKinstry records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Houston vs Detroit professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026 at 1:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Zach McKinstry is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zach McKinstry starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zach McKinstry is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Zach McKinstry is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Zach McKinstry: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?

If Paul Goldschmidt is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Paul Goldschmidt starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Paul Goldschmidt is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Paul Goldschmidt is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Paul Goldschmidt: 1+ hits + runs + RBIs?
